blocks.content: Barbelve carefully laid the unconscious Borbor in front of Piri.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: I'm back.

blocks.speaker: Piri
blocks.content: Yay, meat.
The girl's eyes, as black as obsidian, glowed with a small light as she examined Borbor.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: Piri"s eyes.
Barbelve shivered.
She could control quantum signals.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: Now, where should I start eating?
Just as Piri was about to tear into Borbor's arm, the inner door burst open.

blocks.speaker: Locust-human
blocks.content: Lady Piri.
The locust-humans were crying.

blocks.speaker: Locust-human
blocks.content: We are outraged. Our comrades were brutally killed by that woman. We beg for a chance to avenge them.

blocks.speaker: Piri
blocks.content: Fine, take him.
No matter how exceptional a human was, they were just food.

blocks.speaker: Locust-human
blocks.content: We are the New Humanity. We are not like humans who fight each other over food.

blocks.speaker: Locust-human
blocks.content: Thank you! Thank you!
As the locust-humans dragged Borbor away, Barbelve shrugged awkwardly.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: I thought you'd like it.

blocks.speaker: Locust-human
blocks.content: You need to learn to share. Humans have ruled by consuming everything on the planet. Now, we are just making humans our livestock.
To the New Humanity, humans were just that.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: Argh!
At the scream from outside, Barbelve approached the window and looked at the castle wall.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: I'll catch a better one.
As a breeze swept through the room, the locust's body vanished without a trace.
Growl. Growl.
Tanju Ra shivered as he watched Shirone, surrounded by shimmering light.

blocks.speaker: Tanju Ra
blocks.content: Is this Yahweh's power?
The destruction of over 300 locust-humans was the result of a single strike from the Hand of God.

blocks.speaker: Tanju Ra
blocks.content: The state of seeing the principles of the universe as a single form. It could be called the pinnacle of enlightenment, but…

blocks.speaker: Asraiker
blocks.content: Don't be too surprised. The Messiah is the one who will save humanity. It's natural for him to be on a different level.
Tanju Ra waved his fan.

blocks.speaker: Tanju Ra
blocks.content: Hmph, surprised? I was just confirming the Great Star's skill with the eyes of a magnanimous person.
He couldn't bear to look at Asraiker, whose extreme admiration made him uncomfortable.

blocks.speaker: Tanju Ra
blocks.content: Locusts…
As Shirone muttered with a serious expression, the Earth Dragon Gaitan stepped forward.

blocks.speaker: Gaitan
blocks.content: Is something bothering you?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: In the East, locust swarms are a symbol of disaster. They destroy crops. So this mutant form isn't a coincidence. It's a message to humans.

blocks.speaker: Gaitan
blocks.content: That interpretation is possible. But they don't seem very threatening.

blocks.speaker: Gaitan
blocks.content: The problem is that the mutation is controlled.
That was the key.

blocks.speaker: Gaitan
blocks.content: Hexa can change the law, but she can't control mutations. Humans have minds. Their quantum signals would collide, creating an average.

blocks.speaker: Asraiker
blocks.content: Are you saying our enemy can perfectly control the human mind? That's impossible. There's no way to observe both the position and speed of an electron simultaneously.

blocks.speaker: Gaitan
blocks.content: The mind is a quantum signal. The trajectory of a thrown stone is determined by the law, but what a human will feel in a second only exists as a probability. Even if you offer bread to a starving person, you can't guarantee they'll eat it.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The quantum signal embodies the uncertainty of the mind, and that's why humans define the world. If there's a being that can deny this fact…
Gaitan fell silent at the chilling conclusion.
The outside world.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The only phase that can observe both the position and speed of an electron simultaneously is outside the universe.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: And that means…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even the human mind can be precisely measured there.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Messiah.

blocks.speaker: Tanju Ra
blocks.content: I know.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Are we minds or programs? It doesn't matter. Minds make mistakes, and programs have errors.
The Miracle Stream shimmered and transformed into the massive Hand of God.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What do you think, Tanju Ra?

blocks.speaker: Tanju Ra
blocks.content: Yes? What do you mean?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The mutant that felt like it came from beyond the heavens. Do you think the Hand of God can subdue it?

blocks.speaker: Tanju Ra
blocks.content: …Probably not.
The two apostles showed displeasure, but Shirone nodded calmly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I understand. I'll give the orders now. Tanju Ra, report to the Ivory Tower. Gaitan and Asraiker, rescue Borbor.

blocks.speaker: Asraiker
blocks.content: But we can't leave you, Messiah…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The difficult task is yours. Borbor's mental fluidity is a crucial weapon for humanity. We can't sacrifice him now. Use any means necessary to save him.
As the two apostles showed reluctant expressions, a massive figure fell from the sky with a thud.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: I am Barbelve.
We'll go ahead.

blocks.speaker: Asraiker
blocks.content: Asraiker and Gaitan leaped into the sky and disappeared.
Watching them with his eyes, Barbelve turned his gaze back to Tanju Ra.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: You're the one from before. Did you bring stronger humans? It was a good idea to let you go.
His pride was deeply wounded, but there was no time to consider his emotions.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: Ugh!
As Tanju Ra kicked off the ground and fled, Barbelve's vocal organs trembled.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: Hehe! I knew it. But I don't like letting you go twice.
Barbelve vanished without a trace and reappeared behind Tanju Ra like an afterimage.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: I can kill him and take him.
Just as the locust's claws were about to tear into Tanju Ra's neck, a massive force was felt from the side.
Huh?
When he came to his senses, he was enveloped in light, and his consciousness vibrated.
Boom!
Barbelve tumbled roughly across the ground, crashing through all the buildings in Bukjeon.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: Who are you?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's what I want to ask. Where are you from? Why are you in this world?
He didn't want to talk about Piri.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: Are you the king of humans?
With his limbs on the ground and his back arched, Barbelve looked like a perfect locust.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: Hehe, if that's the case, then it's great. I can show our king the best taste.
Before he finished speaking, Barbelve leaped and swung his claws at Shirone.
Quantum movement activated.
Ugh!
All of Shirone's probabilities were caught by the locust's claws, causing hundreds of shockwaves per second.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: As expected, this guy…
As the force penetrated the Miracle Stream's barrier, Shirone realized.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He's different.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was like cutting out a part of one picture and pasting it onto a completely different one.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He's not a being created by the constants of this universe. He's an entirely different signal.
When the universe was born, the total amount of energy was essentially fixed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: In other words, the mathematical and physical limits of the universe are set.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If the outside world exists, our world is blocked by the barrier of rational numbers.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: For example, if the limit of the most powerful explosion or the fastest speed in the universe is set at 99.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No phenomenon can exceed 99. If it does, it becomes an error, and the system will correct the world.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But Barbelve seemed to be crossing that limit.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The total amount of numbers might be similar, but in certain aspects, he overwhelmed Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Especially his time perception ability.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The temporal perception that penetrated even the quantum signals of the senses.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is dangerous.
Feeling the threat from its early form, Shirone increased his power.
Kieee!
As the Hand of God struck the ground with a thud, Barbelve's body tightened as he blocked it with his face.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Amazing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even if he was livestock, such a level deserved applause.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No. We are the rulers.
Recalling the philosophy of the New Humanity, Barbelve moved even faster and attacked.
Light flashed in all directions, and the tiled houses evaporated from the heat.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Here.
Barbelve broke through the barrier and punched Shirone.
A mushroom cloud rose.
In the cleared area, hundreds of meters in radius, Shirone exhaled deeply.
Hoo!
Barbelve's shoulders trembled.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He blocked it?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A physically impossible phenomenon.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Could he be like Lady Piri? No, that can't be. Livestock can't have such abilities…

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: Where did you learn such childish tricks!
As Barbelve raised his other hand, a sonic boom was heard from the sky.
A sword emitting white light pierced the locust's side.
Aaah!
Shirone's eyes widened.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is…

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: Sermon - Gate.
As Barbelve screamed and was pushed back dozens of meters, his body trembled.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: It hurts! What is this!
Moments later, a man fell from the sky and landed next to Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: Nane.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You're working hard as always, Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: That.
Nane pointed at the locust-human.

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: I was watching from the moon, and I didn't like the feeling. I also have something to discuss with you.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Discuss?

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: The outside world. Things have gotten much more complicated because of your meddling.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's your perspective. If you had thought differently from the start, none of this would have happened.

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: These worthless livestock!
Barbelve shouted, trembling all over.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: How dare you harm the one who will lead the future of the New Humanity! I'll tear you to pieces and chew you up!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Quiet.
As both Shirone and Nane turned their heads simultaneously, Barbelve's shouting abruptly stopped.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's deal with this first, then we'll talk.

blocks.speaker: Nane
blocks.content: Agreed.
Shirone turned first, and Nane followed him, walking slowly.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: What, what is this?

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: I'm feeling fear from mere livestock? No, that's impossible.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: Yet his legs wouldn't move.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: What are these beings?
Yahweh's Hand of God covered the sky, and Buddha's teachings poured down like rain.
Kiaaa!
Born to be a king.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: And at this moment, for the first time, Barbelve regretted choosing life.

blocks.speaker: Barbelve
blocks.content: No, no!
As the flash exploded, what shouldn't exist in this world returned to nothingness.
